no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested dead-code cleanup does not match the current branch state. The usage helpers in cli/internal/agent/session_usage.go are still live: cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go calls agent.BucketUsage at line 188 and agent.LinearSlope at line 293, and the same file uses agent.AggregateUsageCounts at lines 484-505. The file already reflects the monthly-shard refactor described in the bead, so deleting these helpers or their tests would remove live behavior rather than dead code.
